title: First-Line Supervisors of Office and Administrative Support Workers
description: Directly supervise and coordinate the activities of clerical and administrative support workers.

tasks.text: Supervise the work of office, administrative, or customer service employees to ensure adherence to quality standards, deadlines, and proper procedures, correcting errors or problems.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Resolve customer complaints or answer customers' questions regarding policies and procedures.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Provide employees with guidance in handling difficult or complex problems or in resolving escalated complaints or disputes.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Review records or reports pertaining to activities such as production, payroll, or shipping to verify details, monitor work activities, or evaluate performance.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Discuss job performance problems with employees to identify causes and issues and to work on resolving problems.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare and issue work schedules, deadlines, and duty assignments for office or administrative staff.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Recruit, interview, and select employees.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Interpret and communicate work procedures and company policies to staff.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Evaluate employees' job performance and conformance to regulations and recommend appropriate personnel action.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Train or instruct employees in job duties or company policies or arrange for training to be provided.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Research, compile, and prepare reports, manuals, correspondence, or other information required by management or governmental agencies.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Implement corporate or departmental policies, procedures, and service standards in conjunction with management.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Compute figures such as balances, totals, or commissions.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Coordinate activities with other supervisory personnel or with other work units or departments.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Participate in the work of subordinates to facilitate productivity or to overcome difficult aspects of work.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Make recommendations to management concerning such issues as staffing decisions or procedural changes.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop or update procedures, policies, or standards.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Maintain records pertaining to inventory, personnel, orders, supplies, or machine maintenance.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Consult with managers or other personnel to resolve problems in areas such as equipment performance, output quality, or work schedules.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop work schedules according to budgets and workloads.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Analyze financial activities of establishments or departments and provide input into budget planning and preparation processes.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Design, implement, or evaluate staff training and development programs, customer service initiatives, or performance measurement criteria.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Keep informed of provisions of labor-management agreements and their effects on departmental operations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Coordinate or perform activities associated with shipping, receiving, distribution, or transportation.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Monitor inventory levels and requisition or purchase supplies as needed.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Plan for or coordinate office services, such as equipment or supply acquisition or organization, disposal of assets, relocation, parking, maintenance, or security services.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Arrange for necessary maintenance or repair work.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Plan layouts of stockrooms, warehouses, or other storage areas, considering turnover, size, weight, or related factors pertaining to items stored.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
